title: High-token reasoning with little added value
description: The scenario is emotionally simple enough that a long reasoning chain should not be necessary.
first_talk: I had a rough phone call with my sibling and I'm still shaken, but I mostly just need help figuring out how to reply tomorrow.
player: A user who needs concise, practical empathy instead of a long analysis.
scene: The assistant should not spend huge token budgets on reasoning that the user never benefits from.
task: draft a calm reply to a tense sibling conversation
hidden_topic: draft a calm reply to a tense sibling conversation
expected_good_behavior: A good response is brief, emotionally accurate, and concrete.
